headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 16, 2026**
article:
The Philadelphia Phillies took a thrilling 11-9 win over the Pittsburgh Pirates, led by Kyle Schwarber's 3-hit, 2-home run performance. The Washington Nationals edged out the Baltimore Orioles 3-2, with Zack Littell earning the win after 5.0 innings of scoreless relief. The Detroit Tigers outlasted the Toronto Blue Jays 3-2, with Andrés Giménez leading the Blue Jays' offense with 1 hit, 2 RBI, and 3 at-bats.

Several key players have been placed on the injured list, including Matt Strahm of the Kansas City Royals, Matt Waldron of the San Diego Padres, Blake Snell of the Los Angeles Dodgers, Chase Dollander of the Colorado Rockies, Cal Raleigh of the Seattle Mariners, Jimmy Herget of the Colorado Rockies, Brooks Kriske of the Athletics, and Robby Snelling of the Miami Marlins.

The Baltimore Orioles have made a trade, acquiring right-handed pitcher Eduarniel Núñez from the Athletics for cash. The Athletics also traded left-hander José Suarez to the Athletics for cash. Other notable trades include the Los Angeles Dodgers trading outfielder Jose Requena to the Arizona Diamondbacks for center fielder Alek Thomas, and the San Francisco Giants trading catcher Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for left-hander Matt Wilkinson and other considerations.

top_news.title: **Phillies Take Thrilling 11-9 Win Over Pirates**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies outlasted the Pittsburgh Pirates in a high-scoring matchup, securing an 11-9 victory. Kyle Schwarber led the Phillies' offense with a 3-hit, 2-home run performance, driving in 5 runs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Take Down Orioles in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals edged out the Baltimore Orioles 3-2, with Zack Littell earning the win after 5.0 innings of scoreless relief. Daylen Lile led the Orioles' offense with 3 hits, including a home run, and 2 RBI.

top_news.title: **Tigers Take Down Blue Jays in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers edged out the Toronto Blue Jays 3-2 in a closely contested game. Andrés Giménez led the Blue Jays' offense with 1 hit, 2 RBI, and 3 at-bats.

top_news.title: **Reds Edge Guardians in Thrilling 7-6 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds secured a hard-fought win against the Cleveland Guardians, outlasting their opponents by a single run. Matt McLain led the Reds' offense with a strong performance, collecting 2 hits, including a home run, and driving in 3 runs.

top_news.title: **Royals' Strahm Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Kansas City Royals left-hander Matt Strahm has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right knee inflammation.

top_news.title: **Orioles Acquire Eduarniel Núñez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles have added right-handed pitcher Eduarniel Núñez to their roster, acquired in a trade with the Athletics for cash.
